title: The Cryptography behind zkTLS - Xiang Xie - zkTLS Day @ Devconnect 2025 (Buenos Aires)
description:
Cryptography of zkTLS (Xiang Xie, Primus Labs)

Dive into the cryptographic foundations that make zkTLS possible with Xiang Xie, one of the leading minds behind protocols like Ferret, QuickSilver, and modern advances in Oblivious Transfer and Garbled Circuits. This session will unpack the building blocks and explore how these primitives power practical, privacy-preserving zkTLS. Whether you’re a cryptography enthusiast or a developer curious about the math behind zkTLS, this talk will illuminate how cutting-edge research translates into real-world privacy infrastructure.

Recorded live at **zkTLS Day**, part of **Devconnect 2025** in Buenos Aires, Argentina.

Event overview: https://tlsnotary.org/zktls-day
